sections.paragraph:
abbreviation א\"א (אי אפשר)

impossible, not possible; cannot be done

abbreviation א\"א (אברהם אבינו)

Abraham our Father

abbreviation א\"א (אנרגיה אטומית)

atomic energy

abbreviation א\"א (אינפרא אדום)

infra-red, invisible rays just beyond the red of the visible spectrum that have a penetrating heating effect
